title: HEATHER SPEAR-MORRIS NEW VICE-PRESIDENT OF HUMAN RESOURCES
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is pleased to announce that Ms. Heather Spear-Morris is the new Vice President of Human Resources. Ms. Spear-Morris joined our team on June 19, 2018 and will be based in Anchorage, Alaska. She will oversee and develop human resources functions for SNC and its subsi...
